sentiment: The worlds we build inside machines are mirrors of the ones we ache to inhabit.

stories.title: Half-Life 2 in a Browser
stories.summary: A fully playable port of Half-Life 2 running in a web browser, built with WebAssembly and WebGL.

stories.title: Wikipedia Workers in Britain set global first by seeking union recognition
stories.summary: Wikipedia editors and workers in Britain become the first in the world to seek formal trade union recognition for their labor on the platform.

stories.title: Anthropic says Alibaba illicitly extracted Claude AI model capabilities
stories.summary: Anthropic alleges that Alibaba improperly extracted capabilities from its Claude AI model, raising questions about intellectual property in the age of AI.
